nasb.text: Then the king said, “Bring Haman quickly that we may do as Esther desires.” So the king and Haman came to the banquet which Esther had prepared.

esv.text: Then the king said, “Bring Haman quickly, so that we may do as Esther has asked.” So the king and Haman came to the feast that Esther had prepared.

cnv.text: 王說：“快把哈曼召來，好照著以斯帖的話去行。”於是王帶著哈曼去赴以斯帖預備的筵席。

ccb.text: 王说：“快召哈曼来，我们好照以斯帖的话做。”于是王带着哈曼赴以斯帖预备的宴席。
